Summary

Machine learning allowed us to identify cell-level differences in the TME associated with molecular profiles and with survival.

‹#›

MHCII expression in cancer cells predicted OS in the most challenging group - HRPs​

MHCII+ cancer cells are enriched in BRCAloss samples, and have a differential neighborhood compared to MHCII- cancer cells
